description: Operate monday.com from the terminal with a local SQLite mirror, FTS5 search, typed bulk edits, and cross-board analytics that no online tool ships.

novel_features.name: Cross-board activity since window
novel_features.description: Tail every change across every synced board since a window or timestamp; filter by user, column, or board without burning API points.

novel_features.name: Per-person workload across boards
novel_features.description: Per-user open-item count weighted by status and overdue flag, computed across every board the user is assigned on.

novel_features.name: Status-bottleneck dwell-time analyzer
novel_features.description: Per-status median and p90 dwell time per item, computed from activity-log transitions on a board.

novel_features.name: Sprint velocity & slip report
novel_features.description: Per-sprint committed / completed / slipped / added-mid-sprint counts, plus per-person delivered, across the last N sprint cycles.

novel_features.name: Column-schema drift detector
novel_features.description: Reports columns added, removed, renamed, or retyped on a board since the last sync.

novel_features.name: Cross-board contextual mentions
novel_features.description: FTS5 search across item names, update bodies, doc bodies, and text-typed column values; result rows hydrated with board, group, and owner context.

novel_features.name: Pre-flight complexity budget
novel_features.description: Predicts the complexity-points cost of a query and the remaining account-minute budget without executing the body.

novel_features.name: Bulk column-value editor with typed dry-run
novel_features.description: Read a CSV; validate every cell against the cached typed-column schema; print a unified diff in dry-run; on apply, run change_item_column_values per row with per-row exit codes and resume-on-failure.

novel_features.name: Mirror & formula dependency resolver
novel_features.description: For a given item or column, walks mirror and formula chains in the local store and prints the source board, source item, source column, and final resolved value.

novel_features.name: External-CSV reconcile
novel_features.description: Joins a local board to an external CSV by a chosen column-value key; emits only-in-monday, only-in-csv, and diff sets.

novel_features.name: Per-board health scorecard
novel_features.description: Per-board scorecard: % items with owner, % with due-date, % overdue, % updated in last 7d, count of empty status, count of broken mirror columns.

novel_features.name: Item full-context dump
novel_features.description: For one item-id, returns one JSON blob with the item, every column-value typed, every update, every reply, every linked doc, every asset metadata, every activity log entry, and every mirror source.

novel_features.name: Cross-system ID exporter
novel_features.description: Joins Monday items to whichever column stores their cross-system ID (Linear id, Notion page-id, Slack thread-ts) and emits a structured list ready to pipe into another tool.
